components.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse style layout or strict 1px solid borders.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Content left-aligned.

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-950 text-white rounded-none hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors px-6 py-2 text-sm font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-zinc-950 border border-zinc-200 rounded-none hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white rounded-none hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium

components.inputs: rounded-none border border-zinc-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-950 focus:border-transparent

badges.high: bg-red-100 text-red-800 border border-red-200 rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
badges.medium: bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 border border-yellow-200 rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
badges.low: bg-green-100 text-green-800 border border-green-200 rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium

instructions_to_main_agent: Use strict grid layouts with sharp borders (rounded-none) to emphasize the technical data-tooling nature.
The metrics should use the 'metric' typography scale (large, font-light) and mono fonts for actual numbers.
Ensure 'Import/Refresh Data' button is distinct but not the primary focus (secondary or outline button).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive inputs and calculated output fields.
Use JetBrains Mono or similar monospaced fonts for numerical data and scores to enforce tabular alignment.
Display caveat text in a muted, smaller font at the bottom of the form or results section.
For the header, use a simple text logo with a 1px bottom border for the navigation area.
Ensure the tool is fully accessible, handling contrast ratios correctly.
